response: Profile: I am a dedicated, organized, and leadership-oriented individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription. I have extensive knowledge of medical terminology across various specialties, including Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, and more. I possess strong interpersonal skills, am an excellent team player, and am committed to continuous learning and skill development. I am reliable, dependable, and consistently seek new responsibilities to contribute to organizational success. My experience includes medical transcription, editing, and customer relationship management, with a proven ability to meet deadlines and maintain high accuracy. I have worked with various software platforms such as eClinicalWorks and MS Office. I am passionate about customer service and have a strong work ethic, making me a valuable asset to any team. I am currently on a visit visa and looking for a new opportunity to further my career in medical transcription.
